headline: How The DexCom (DXCM) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Diverge
summary: DexCom’s fair value price target has been tweaked from US$85.85 to US$86.12 per share, a small shift that still matters if you are tracking what analysts are baking into their models. This move sits alongside Street targets that currently span from the low US$70s to the mid US$80s, reflecting different views on competition and how the continuous glucose monitoring market might shape DexCom’s valuation. As you read on, you will see how these price targets and the story behind them can help you...

headline: 2 Healthcare Stocks to Target This Week and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. Players catalyzing medical advancements have benefited from elevated demand, and their momentum is only rising as the industry has posted a 1.1% gain over the past six months while the S&P 500 was stuck in neutral.
